name: Lider Faktoring A.S.
summary: Lider Faktoring A.S. operates as a factoring company in Turkey. It engages in the factoring and debt management of credit impaired assets portfolios. The company was formerly known as Lider Faktoring Hizmetleri A.S. to Lider Faktoring A.S. in July 2013. Lider Faktoring A.S. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
